race.comment: RIEZ SOUVENT (11) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome two back but the win when resuming and the close-up second last time out were full of merit. Is one from one around this circuit and should be right there at the business end. HARD AS BROK (10) has gotten better with each run this time in and looks to be working up to another victory. Gets 2kg off from a low draw and must be respected out of the Vandyke yard. Include in calculations. KUNDABUNG (2) hasn't been too far away at the past couple and maps nicely for this from gate two. Ready to peak now. CAISHEN (1) has a win and a placing from two spins around this circuit and will be cherry-ripe now fourth run back. In the mix. The well-related WEEKEND ARTIST (6) (half to G3 winner and G2 placed I'm All The Talk) next in line.
